subject: [PATCH 5/6 v3] mm/memcontrol: optimize memsw stock for cgroup v1

2026-06-05.patch_summary: This patch optimizes the way memory usage is tracked in cgroup v1 by introducing a new, independent stock for the memsw page counter. This allows for better caching and reduces the number of hierarchical charges required when both memsw and memory page counters are over their limits. The change may cause reported memsw usage to temporarily be lower than memory usage due to batching of stock charges.
